title: Add BrightPeak Review Network as a watchlist entity record
summary: This sample proposal requests formal inclusion of BrightPeak Review Network in the watchlist set based on a fictional record of coordinated review spam and synthetic expert positioning.
rationale: The supporting evidence suggests a repeated and organized pattern across multiple related domains. In this sample governance scenario, the record is sufficient for early inclusion and continued review, but is kept at the watchlist level pending further corroboration.
notes: This is a fictional example showing how a new watchlist record could be proposed from a public evidence trail.
decision_reason: Pending community review of whether the current fictional record is sufficient for watchlist inclusion.

title: Upgrade NovaStride Running Lab from watchlist to restricted
summary: This sample proposal recommends upgrading NovaStride Running Lab from watchlist to restricted due to a stronger fictional record of repeated comparison-page placement patterns.
rationale: The evidence indicates that the observed placement pattern is not isolated and appears across related fictional properties with similar structure and language. In this sample workflow, that makes the record suitable for restricted treatment rather than continued watch-only status.
notes: This example links the existing watchlist entity to a simple status-upgrade workflow.
decision_reason: The proposal is ready for vote once the linked fictional evidence record is accepted as sufficient for escalation.
